name: Kava Gummies - Pineapple Coconut
description: Island vibes in a gummy? Hell yes. Our Pineapple Coconut gummies taste like vacation and feel like a mental massage. Smooth coconut meets sweet pineapple and potent noble kava for the ultimate chill pill (except it's a gummy). Perfect for when life's throwing too much at you and you need to tap out for a bit.

name: Kava Mohe Gummies - Lemon Ginger
shortDescription: Bedtime just got way more interesting.
description: Bedtime just got way more interesting. Our Lemon Ginger Mohe gummies are basically dreams in edible form. Tangy lemon meets spicy ginger and premium kava to help you wind down like a boss. Say goodbye to tossing and turning, and hello to the sleep of your life. Sweet dreams are made of these.

name: Kava Gummies - Dragon Fruit Lychee
shortDescription: Get ready to vibe with our Dragon Fruit Lychee gummies!
description: Get ready to vibe with our Dragon Fruit Lychee gummies! Sweet, exotic, and seriously chill-inducing. These bad boys pack premium noble kava in every tropical bite. Pop one and let that legendary Pacific Island relaxation wash over you—no bitter aftertaste, no sediment, just pure bliss in gummy form.

name: Kava Shots - Pineapple Coconut
description: Tropical energy meets zen relaxation. Our daytime Pineapple Coconut shots pack 500mg of kava with green tea caffeine and L-Theanine—so you can crush your day without the jitters or crashes. It's like having your chill and your hustle in one delicious 2oz bottle. Game changer.

name: Kava Mohe Shots - Ginger Lime
shortDescription: Your ticket to dreamland in a 2oz shot.
description: Your ticket to dreamland in a 2oz shot. Zesty lime meets warming ginger and sleep-friendly kava to knock out your night in the best way possible. No counting sheep, no melatonin hangover—just pure, natural relaxation that actually works. Bottoms up, sleepyhead.

name: Kava Seltzer - Ginger Lime
shortDescription: Spicy meets zesty in the most chill way possible.
description: Spicy meets zesty in the most chill way possible. Our Ginger Lime seltzer brings the heat with warming ginger and the zing of fresh lime, all mellowed out with 750mg of premium kava. It's bold, it's refreshing, and it's seriously relaxing. Perfect for when you need that edge taken off but still want some flavor excitement. Zero alcohol, zero sugar, zero compromise. Just straight-up relaxation with a kick.

name: Kava Seltzer - Strawberry Kiwi
description: Berry good vibes only. Our Strawberry Kiwi seltzer is the perfect combo of sweet, ripe strawberries and tangy kiwi—bright, fruity, and totally refreshing. Loaded with 750mg of premium kava to help you unwind without the hangover. Each 12oz can is like a mini vacation for your taste buds. Zero alcohol, zero sugar, zero stress. Just pure berry bliss that makes relaxation taste this good.

name: Kava Seltzer - Mango Orange
description: Sunshine in a can. Our Mango Orange seltzer brings the heat with juicy mango vibes and zesty orange energy, all wrapped up with 750mg of premium kava to keep you chill. It's the perfect balance of tropical sweetness and citrus zing—bursting with flavor, zero in guilt. No alcohol, no sugar, no regrets. Just smooth relaxation that tastes like summer and feels like pure bliss.

name: Kava Seltzer - Dragon Fruit Lychee
description: Exotic AF and ridiculously refreshing. Our Dragon Fruit Lychee seltzer is a tropical escape in a can—sweet dragon fruit meets delicate lychee in a sparkling fusion that'll transport you to paradise. Each 12oz can packs 750mg of premium noble kava for that smooth, stress-free vibe. Zero alcohol, zero sugar, zero BS. Just pure exotic relaxation that tastes like vacation and feels like floating on a cloud.

name: Kava Seltzer - Pineapple Coconut
description: Vacation in a can. Our Pineapple Coconut seltzer tastes like the beach and feels like Friday at 5pm. Zero sugar means you can drink as many as you want without the guilt. Loaded with premium kava for that perfect social buzz minus the alcohol. Paradise found.

name: Kava Seltzer - Lemon Lime
description: Classic citrus meets ancient chill. Our Lemon Lime seltzer is crisp, refreshing, and packed with kava goodness. Zero sugar, zero hangover, maximum relaxation. It's the social drink that actually makes you feel good the next day. Crack one and feel the stress melt away.

name: Kava Seltzer - Mixed Berry
description: Zero sugar, zero BS, 100% chill. Our Mixed Berry seltzer is bursting with berry goodness and loaded with premium noble kava. Crack one open when you need to take the edge off without the alcohol. Keto-friendly, vegan, and completely free of anything fake. Just pure relaxation in a can.
